name: Dock
description: macOS-style icon dock with cursor-proximity magnification.

api.name: Dock
api.description: macOS-style icon dock with cursor-proximity magnification.

parameters.name: MaxScale
parameters.description: Maximum scale factor applied to the item closest to the cursor (e.g. 1.8 = 80% bigger).

parameters.name: MagnifyRadius
parameters.description: Radius (px) around each item within which neighbors start scaling.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible label for the dock toolbar container. Defaults to "Application Dock".

examples.title: Basic Dock
examples.code:
<Dock>
    <button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-card border border-border/40 flex items-center justify-center" title="Home">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.House" class="h-6 w-6 text-foreground/80" />
    </button>
    <button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-card border border-border/40 flex items-center justify-center" title="Files">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.FolderOpen" class="h-6 w-6 text-foreground/80" />
    </button>
    <button class="w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-card border border-border/40 flex items-center justify-center" title="Mail">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Mail" class="h-6 w-6 text-foreground/80" />
    </button>
</Dock>

examples.title: Custom Scale & Radius
examples.code:
<Dock MaxScale="2.2" MagnifyRadius="120">
    <!-- dock items with Blazicon icons -->
</Dock>

mdSummary:
# Dock

macOS-style icon dock with cursor-proximity magnification.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/dock

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Dock | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| Dock | MaxScale | `double` | `1.8` | Maximum scale factor applied to the item closest to the cursor (e.g. 1.8 = 80% bigger). |
| Dock | MagnifyRadius | `int` | `100` | Radius (px) around each item within which neighbors start scaling. |
| Dock | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible label for the dock toolbar container. Defaults to "Application Dock". |
| Dock | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Dock | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Dock) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- `ComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Dock />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Dock/Dock.razor`
